sources.label: Investing.com - JPMorgan upgrades Cognex to Overweight, $75 target (May 26, 2026; predates window)
StockAnalysis - CGNX analyst forecast, consensus Buy, ~$76 avg target
Yahoo Finance - CGNX press releases (no new releases since Jun 6)
Simply Wall St - Cognex earnings beat and AI vision systems recap

verdicts.rankRationale: No material news since Jun 6 and yesterday's verdict already reconciled the +64% YTD rerating; today's newsless -2.8% drift does not change the setup. The 'latent' character keeps eroding at the margin - four major sell-side upgrades (JPM, GS, KeyBanc, Bernstein) and a consensus Buy mean the factory-automation recovery is no longer hidden, justifying a small negative drift rather than a rank move.
verdicts.bull: Q1 beat with EBITDA margins up ~1,000bps to 26.9%, OneVision GA and In-Sight 3900/6900 edge-AI launches show the AI vision flywheel is real; salesforce transformation is reportedly doubling the customer base.
verdicts.neutral: Consensus Buy with ~$76 average target vs $60.65 price leaves modest upside, but all of that is now a well-telegraphed Street view rather than an under-owned insight.
verdicts.bear: At +64% YTD and 4 fresh upgrades, the capex-recovery alpha the thesis required has largely been harvested; any Q2 guidance wobble against 28-31% margin expectations triggers a sharp de-rate.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Q2 2026 results confirming 28-31% EBITDA margin guidance and continued logistics/electronics order momentum.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Crowded post-rerating positioning: a factory-automation capex pause or margin miss unwinds the multiple faster than fundamentals deteriorate.

verdicts.rankRationale: The page thesis already discounts the rerating and the indirect humanoid link, and nothing since Jun 6 changes either; yesterday's hold at this rank stands. Today's -2.8% pullback is too small to improve asymmetry meaningfully.
verdicts.bull: Machine vision is a genuine enabling layer for any robot that has to perceive parts; edge-AI In-Sight systems and OneVision broaden Cognex beyond classic inspection toward robot guidance.
verdicts.neutral: Cognex earns robotics exposure through factory and logistics vision, not humanoids; the score already reflects sensing purity without humanoid leverage.
verdicts.bear: Humanoid programs largely use commodity cameras plus in-house perception stacks, so the humanoid narrative never accrues to Cognex while the stock already prices an automation recovery.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: A named design win embedding Cognex vision in a high-volume robotics or humanoid platform.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Robotics investors rotate to purer actuation/perception plays, leaving Cognex as rerated industrial cyclical beta.
